message:
Split WASM into server (865KB) and core (83KB) modules for tree-shakeable npm imports

Core module exports pure computation (SHA-1, zlib, delta, packfile, object parsing,
protocol, SIMD) without libgit2 or host imports — 10x smaller for client-side use.

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,8 @@
   "packageManager": "pnpm@10.21.0",
   "scripts": {
     "build:wasm": "cd wasm && zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall && mkdir -p ../src/wasm && wasm-metadce --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --graph-file exports.json zig-out/bin/gitmode.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode.wasm && rm ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm",
+    "build:wasm-core": "cd wasm && zig build core -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall && mkdir -p ../src/wasm && wasm-metadce --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --graph-file exports-core.json zig-out/bin/gitmode-core.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode-core.dce.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory ../src/wasm/gitmode-core.dce.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode-core.wasm && rm ../src/wasm/gitmode-core.dce.wasm",
+    "build:wasm-all": "pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:wasm-core",
     "build": "vite build",
     "dev": "vite dev",
     "preview": "vite preview",
